limitations: StormGrid output is response priority, not outage probability. This is a triage ranking model for HRM communities under sparse data, not household outage prediction, pole-level failure prediction, or a validated Nova Scotia province-wide production model. Historical prior and observed replay labels may share the same outage source, creating same-source bias. Top-K validation is replay ranking evidence, not proof of future outage prediction accuracy. Vulnerability features may include seeded proxy values and storm replay values may be scenario approximations.
